data.title: Coinbase CEO: A "win-win-win" situation can be achieved between the White House, banks, and the crypto industry on crypto infrastructure legislation.
data.description: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong stated in a post on the X platform that Coinbase recently participated in two White House meetings, where the White House, banks, and the crypto industry were able to achieve a "win-win" situation regarding crypto structural legislation. Coinbase will continue to prioritize core consumer rights, including stablecoin rewards mechanisms, and is confident in driving a "win-win" solution that balances crypto policy agendas with banks' concerns, while ensuring that the interests of crypto users are prioritized. Armstrong added that Coinbase actively promoted related issues before the industry widely focused on market structure and will continue to participate in policy discussions. However, while the GENIUS bill was passed six months ago, its current re-examination may have a significant long-term impact on the platform's customers.

data.title: Finance: Three types of cross-border RWA businesses—debt-heavy, equity-heavy, etc.—are feasible.
data.description: An article in *Caijing* magazine points out that the "Notice on Further Preventing and Handling Risks Related to Virtual Currencies" defines RWA tokenization as a new type of securities activity. This means that securities intermediaries licensed in both mainland China and Hong Kong are expected to benefit. The analysis identifies three feasible types of cross-border RWA businesses: 1. Debt-related RWA tokenization, characterized by a defined term with principal and interest repayment upon maturity. 2. Equity-related RWA tokenization, typically involving dividends and without a defined maturity date. 3. Other types of RWA tokenization, such as gold-based RWA tokenization.

data.title: Ares Faces Dispute Over Major Sports Investment
data.description: Ares Management Corporation is currently embroiled in a contentious disagreement regarding the dissolution of one of its significant sports investments. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the escalating tensions surrounding the situation. The dispute centers on the financial intricacies and strategic decisions involved in unwinding the investment, which has become a focal point for stakeholders. As the situation develops, the outcome could have substantial implications for Ares and its investment strategy moving forward.

data.title: Cape Town Seeks Power Trading Companies for Electricity Supply
data.description: Cape Town is taking steps to address its electricity needs by appointing a panel of power trading companies. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the city's initiative to source electricity through these companies. This move is part of Cape Town's broader strategy to ensure a stable and reliable power supply for its residents. The city aims to diversify its energy sources and reduce reliance on traditional power providers. By engaging with power trading companies, Cape Town hopes to enhance its energy security and meet the growing demand for electricity.

data.title: Key Economic Indicators Scheduled for Release Today
data.description: Key economic indicators are set to be released today at 8:30 AM Eastern Time, including the Consumer Price Index (CPI) and Core CPI. Bespoke Investment Group posted on X. These indicators are crucial for assessing inflation trends and economic health. Analysts and investors will closely monitor the data to gauge potential impacts on financial markets and economic policy. The CPI measures the average change in prices paid by consumers for goods and services, while Core CPI excludes food and energy prices, providing a clearer picture of underlying inflation. The release of these figures is expected to influence market expectations and decisions by policymakers. As the data becomes available, it will offer insights into the current economic environment and future outlook.

data.title: STOCKS | Nvidia Shares Remain Stagnant Despite Increased AI Infrastructure Spending
data.description:
Nvidia shares have remained largely unchanged despite major tech companies increasing their spending on AI infrastructure. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the discrepancy between the rising investment in AI and Nvidia's stock performance. The tech giant, known for its powerful graphics processing units (GPUs), has been a key player in the AI sector, providing essential hardware for machine learning and data processing.

Despite the growing demand for AI capabilities, Nvidia's stock has not seen significant movement in recent months. Analysts suggest that while the company benefits from the AI boom, market expectations and external factors may be influencing its stock price. The tech industry continues to invest heavily in AI infrastructure, with companies aiming to enhance their capabilities and maintain competitive advantages.

Nvidia's position in the market remains strong, with its products being integral to AI development. However, the stagnation in its share price raises questions about investor sentiment and market dynamics. As AI technology evolves, Nvidia's role in the industry is expected to grow, potentially impacting its stock performance in the future.

data.title: DeFiance Capital CEO Advocates Shift to Cash Flow-Focused Crypto Investments
data.description: DeFiance Capital CEO Arthur has highlighted a significant transition in the cryptocurrency market, moving away from venture capital-driven growth towards investments focused on short-term cash flow. According to NS3.AI, Arthur stressed that future crypto projects should prioritize being pure cash flow businesses, aiming to recover invested capital within 6 to 12 months and achieve returns of 3x to 5x. He cautioned that persisting with investments in hype-driven growth projects could result in capital depletion.

data.title: CalPERS Increases MicroStrategy Holdings by 22,475 Shares
data.description: The California State Public Employees' Retirement Fund (CalPERS) has expanded its investment in MicroStrategy (MSTR) by acquiring an additional 22,475 shares. According to NS3.AI, this acquisition elevates CalPERS' total holdings in MicroStrategy to 470,632 shares, with an estimated value of $59 million. CalPERS, recognized as the largest public pension fund in the United States, manages assets totaling $611 billion.

data.title: Alameda Research Transfers $26 Million in Tokens Amid Bankruptcy
data.description: Alameda Research has converted 129 million STG tokens, valued at approximately $26 million, into about 11.14 million ZRO tokens. According to NS3.AI, these ZRO tokens, worth around $25.96 million, were subsequently transferred to the crypto trading firm Wintermute. This transaction highlights a notable asset reallocation from Alameda's holdings to Wintermute during the ongoing bankruptcy proceedings.

data.title: ECB Advocates Centralized Oversight for Major EU Asset Managers
data.description: The European Central Bank (ECB) has expressed support for centralized supervision of the European Union's largest asset managers. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the ECB staff's backing of this contentious proposal aimed at enhancing regulatory oversight. The move is seen as a step towards ensuring greater stability and transparency within the financial sector. The ECB's stance comes amid ongoing discussions about the need for more robust regulatory frameworks to manage risks associated with large asset management firms. This proposal has sparked debate among stakeholders, with some arguing that centralized supervision could lead to more efficient monitoring and risk management, while others raise concerns about potential overreach and the impact on market dynamics. The ECB's endorsement underscores the importance of addressing systemic risks and maintaining financial stability in the EU's asset management industry.

data.title: Coinbase Developer Platform: SQL API now supports x402 payments
data.description: Coinbase Developer Platform announced that its SQL API now supports the x402 payment standard, allowing AI agents to directly query indexed Base blockchain data and pay in USDC on request, without requiring an API key, account registration, or manual approval process. The SQL API is reportedly the first service to integrate with Coinbase Developer Platform via x402, and more native institutional services for AI agents are expected to be launched soon.

data.title: CoinW issued a security alert: Beware of fake websites and applications that may induce you to transfer funds.
data.description: CoinW recently issued an official announcement warning of a recent fraudulent activity involving a fake website and mobile application (App). The scammers maliciously imitated CoinW's name, graphics, logo, and brand image. They targeted potential victims through the internet and publicly available information on social media platforms such as LinkedIn. They used victims' social media profiles to verify their location and establish initial contact, then induced users to transfer communication to Telegram. The scammers commonly used manipulative tactics (including fabricating stories of a "luxurious lifestyle") to trick victims into transferring cryptocurrency to wallet addresses they controlled. CoinW strongly advises users to access the official website or download the app only through official channels. If you have any doubts about the source of information, please contact the CoinW legal team immediately for verification. If you discover any suspicious websites or counterfeit apps, please immediately stop using them and report them to CoinW. CoinW stated that it will continue to strengthen its security and risk control system, maintain a safe, fair, and transparent trading environment, and firmly support global anti-fraud, anti-money laundering, and sanctions compliance efforts.

data.title: Alameda exchanged 129 million STG for 11.14 million ZRO and transferred them to Wintertermute.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, yesterday the Alameda bankruptcy address (0x92b...7B0) exchanged 129 million STG (approximately $26 million) for 11.14 million ZRO (approximately $25.96 million). Twelve hours ago, this address transferred the 11.14 million ZRO to Wintertermute.

data.title: STOCKS | Hang Seng Index Quarterly Review Adds Three Companies
data.description: The Hang Seng Index Company has announced the results of its quarterly review for the Hang Seng Index series. According to Ming Pao, three companies, Ningde Times (3750), Luoyang Molybdenum (3993), and Lao Feng Xiang (6181), have been added to the blue-chip list. Meanwhile, Zhongsheng Group (0881) has been removed, increasing the total number of blue-chip stocks from 88 to 90.

data.title: Indonesia's Free Meals Program Promoted as Economic Growth Driver
data.description: President Prabowo Subianto has reinforced his commitment to the free meals initiative, emphasizing its importance in stimulating economic growth. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting Subianto's assertion that the program is crucial for boosting the nation's economy. The initiative aims to provide meals to those in need, thereby supporting local food producers and suppliers. Subianto believes that by ensuring food security, the program can contribute significantly to economic stability and development. The president's focus on this program reflects his broader strategy to enhance economic resilience and support vulnerable communities. As the program continues to expand, it is expected to play a key role in Indonesia's economic landscape.

data.title: Legal Ruling Casts Uncertainty on Group Supporter Prosecutions
data.description: A recent legal decision has raised questions about the validity of numerous prosecutions against individuals supporting a particular group. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the implications of this ruling, which could potentially affect hundreds of cases. Legal experts are now examining the decision's impact on ongoing and future prosecutions, as authorities reassess their strategies in light of the ruling. The uncertainty surrounding these cases underscores the complexities involved in prosecuting supporters of controversial groups, prompting a reevaluation of legal approaches and enforcement policies.

data.title: California Pension Fund Increases Stake in Bitcoin Treasury Firm
data.description:
The California Public Employees' Retirement Fund has increased its holdings in the Bitcoin treasury company, Strategy, by acquiring an additional 22,475 shares. According to ChainCatcher, this brings the fund's total shares in the company to 470,632, valued at approximately $59 million.

The retirement fund manages assets totaling around $611 billion.

data.title: Openclaw Founder Discusses Acquisition Offers and Open Source Commitment
data.description:
Openclaw founder Peter Steinberger recently confirmed during an interview with Lex Fridman that the company has received acquisition offers from multiple firms. According to BlockBeats, Steinberger expressed disinterest in potential financing deals worth millions or billions, citing concerns over time consumption and conflicts of interest, such as prioritizing enterprise versions and altering open-source licenses, which could harm the community. He emphasized his desire for completely free open-source solutions without conditions, noting that relying on donations is unsustainable, as evidenced by popular projects like Tailwind undergoing layoffs.

Steinberger also revealed that Openclaw is currently operating at a loss, with monthly revenues ranging from $10,000 to $20,000, while subsidizing personally maintained dependent projects. Although companies like OpenAI provide some support, the situation remains unsustainable.

Regarding collaboration with large laboratories, Steinberger stated that the core condition is maintaining the project's open-source nature, similar to Chrome and Chromium. He stressed the importance of not entrusting the project entirely to a single company and highlighted the unique community atmosphere of ClawCon, reminiscent of the early internet enthusiasm. Steinberger aims to spread this spirit to more people, considering this year as the beginning of personal agency, with laboratory collaboration being the fastest way to achieve this. He also expressed interest in experiencing work within a large company, as he has never done so before.
